title: 決起ッ！　夜明け前ッ！！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's four in the morning, the very crack of dawn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wide awake, I head outside to take a walk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I stroll about, I hear a commotion in the
distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head toward the source of the noise, where I
find Director Akikawa and several other staff
members.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Commendations! Wonderful work, everyone!
Another day, another pristine track!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! In recognition of your efforts... Behold! I
have decided to bestow upon you all a new piece
of equipment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrrroom, vroom, vrrroooom!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Erm... Director? What on earth is that strange
machine?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Surprised? 'Tis a turf and dirt course maintenance
machine... or so I'm reliably informed! It's a
cutting-edge model ten times more efficient than
our current methods!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Between its prodigious size and high
performance, it's the invention of the century!
Thusly! I was happy to empty my own pockets to
obtain it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt! Bzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text: Why's it making that weird noise?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Rest assured! I'm confident that you can master it
in no time!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But it's only natural to fear the unknown... Very
well! Allow me to provide a demonstration!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! But Director, you can't ride that! It's five
times your size!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! I was born on the turf! Raised by it! I
am one with the maintenance equipment!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Now let's see here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Zzzoooom!!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Director?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Apologies... Phew... Thank you all. Without your
intervention, I dread to think what might have
happened!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
A-as long as you're all right... But what compelled
you to buy this?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Naturally... it is to express my gratitude to you all!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to your hard work that our students
can focus on pursuing their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Tireless commitment! Flawless performance! As
much as it is within my power, I want to reward
you for your efforts!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text: Director...

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Director. You won't regret placing
your trust in us. We'll put this machine to good
use!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Now that's the kind of smile I like to see!
Wonderful! Magnificent! I'll be counting on you
all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the staff members seem heartened by Director
Akikawa's commitment to the academy and its
students.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling inspired by her enthusiasm myself, I
resolve to help her out in any way I can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, I tell <chrname> what I saw.
